title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Reiju, Unknown person #16 as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Damn it... you guys, go on ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Go after SanJ!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: R... right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't Go!! Chopper! Carrot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's some- thing off about this place!! This is just the begin- ning of the weird stuff to come, I'm sure of it!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Who... the hell are you ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Eeeee! Ekki

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Gya AAAA! AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: th...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There's a huge person buried alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Woah, you scared the crap outta me~!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You took the words right outta our mouths!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you okay?! Who did this to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WHA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Your body! It's buried into the ground!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm buried like this because I like being buried~.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAA... this guy's nuts!! Why did I bother to worry?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could really go for some juice right about now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I don't give a damn!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chopper... breath... no point in getting all worked up about it. Save your energy for something that's actually important...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hold on a sec... you three...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I absolutely love Apple juice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you go and take a left, you'll find a waterfall of Apple juice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Ignore him, ignore him, ignore him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's focus our energies looking for Sanji! ...I'm honestly starting to wonder if this is all a bad dream.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You all must be looking for someone! I believe he just ran past here a short while ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd be happy to tell you which direction he ran off to if you could simply bring me back some Apple juice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Nami, watch out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Gyaa Aaaah H!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What... huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even the trees talk... and that rabbit just now was totally trying to kill me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's hurry back to where Luffy is! While we still know how to get back!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: But what about Sanji?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't even know if that's the real Sanji! If it were really him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...he wouldn't just sit idly by and watch us deal with this mess!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Huh?! our com- pass...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Our watch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Nothing about this forest makes sense!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Did you hear?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I sure did!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Move in closer, guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: tree." Tree.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Let's cover up their exit,5

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One piece will be taking a break during next week.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Flower.. flower.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Let's play, let us play!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: - They have really stepped in it now! This forest... has some very ill intentions!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: N&T: Let us play a game of death.[5

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
